auth.subtitle: Think it. Build it. Ship it.
auth.aiDescription: From idea to deliverable — AI generates PRDs, code, designs, and prototypes, all in one place.
auth.loginFailed: Login failed, please check your username and password
auth.registerDescription: After registration, the admin will complete review within 1 business day. You can start using it after approval.
auth.registerHint: Fill in the info and wait for admin approval
auth.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 20 characters
auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.registerFailed: Registration failed, please try again later
auth.pendingDescription: Your account has been submitted and is awaiting admin approval.
auth.pendingNote: Please log in again after approval.
auth.activationSuccess: Your account has been activated! You can now log in.
auth.activationFailed: Activation failed. The link may have expired or already been used.
auth.invalidActivationLinkDesc: The link is missing required parameters. Please use the link from your email.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Enter your registered email and we'll send a reset link
auth.resetEmailSent: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

selfService.sectionAccountDescription: Manage your sign-in password and account notification email.
selfService.sectionDangerDescription: These actions permanently affect your account and data.
selfService.superAdminBlocked: Super administrators cannot delete their own account. Please transfer the super-admin role first, or contact support.

profileBasics.title: Personal profile
profileBasics.description: Edit your nickname, bio and avatar. Other fields are managed in Account Security or Language settings.
profileBasics.errorNicknameTooLong: Nickname must be at most {max} characters
profileBasics.errorDescriptionTooLong: Bio must be at most {max} characters
profileBasics.errorAvatarTooLong: Avatar URL must be at most {max} characters
profileBasics.errorAvatarSize: Image is too large. Max {maxMb} MB
profileBasics.avatarUploadHint: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF, up to {maxMb} MB
profileBasics.avatarUrlFallbackHint: Image uploads are unavailable in this environment. You can use an image URL instead.

stepUp.title: Identity Verification
stepUp.descRedirect: For your security, please re-authenticate with {provider}.
stepUp.descOtp: We sent a verification code to {email}. Please enter it within {minutes} minutes.
stepUp.descUnsupported: Your current sign-in method does not support this action. Please contact support.
stepUp.locked: Too many attempts, please try again later
stepUp.expired: Verification session expired, please start over

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.descSet: Set a password so you can sign in with your username.
changePassword.tooWeak: Password too weak — include upper/lowercase and numbers

changeEmail.title: Change email
changeEmail.pending: A confirmation link has been sent to {email}. Please confirm from the email.
changeEmail.confirmSuccess: Email updated. Please sign in again.
changeEmail.confirmError: The confirmation link is invalid or expired.
changeEmail.taken: This email is already in use

deleteAccount.sectionHint: Account deletion cannot be undone. Some data will be retained in anonymized form for finance and audit compliance.
deleteAccount.dialogHint: Please type your username {username} to confirm.
deleteAccount.checkboxIrreversible: I understand this action is irreversible
deleteAccount.userDeleted: Account has been deleted and cannot be used.

avatar.invalidType: Only JPG / PNG / WebP are supported
avatar.featureDisabled: Avatar upload is not yet available

errorCommon.rateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later
errorCommon.featureDisabled: This feature is not yet available

errorCodes.STEP_UP_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: Identity verification is invalid, expired, or already used
errorCodes.STEP_UP_UNAVAILABLE: Self-service identity verification is unavailable for this account
errorCodes.OTP_LOCKED: Too many attempts, please try again later
errorCodes.OTP_ALREADY_CONSUMED: This verification code has already been used
errorCodes.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests, please try again later
errorCodes.ACCOUNT_DELETE_CONFIRMATION_MISMATCH: The username confirmation does not match
errorCodes.PROVIDER_REAUTH_UNSUPPORTED: Your current sign-in method cannot re-authenticate here

auth.newPasswordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters with upper/lowercase and numbers
auth.resetSuccess: Password reset successful. Please log in again.
auth.resetFailed: Reset failed. The link may have expired or already been used.
auth.invalidResetLinkDesc: The link is missing required parameters. Please use the link from your email.
auth.oauthGenericError: Third-party sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.oauthEmailConflict: This email is already registered. Please sign in with your password first, then link the account in settings.
auth.oauthAlreadyLinked: This account is already linked to another user.
auth.oauthCannotUnlinkLast: You must keep at least one sign-in method.
auth.oauthProviderDisabled: This sign-in method is not available.
auth.oauthStateInvalid: Sign-in session expired. Please try again.
auth.oauthExpired: Sign-in link expired. Please try again.
auth.oauthProviderNotLaunched: This sign-in method is not available yet.
auth.emailSupplementPrompt: Add an email to secure your account and enable recovery.
auth.emailSupplementSent: Verification email sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.
auth.emailSupplementError: Could not send verification email. Please try again.
auth.emailConfirmSuccess: Email verified. You can return to the app.
auth.emailConfirmError: Verification link is invalid or expired.
